merchantId.description: Find your Friendbuy Merchant ID by logging in to your [Friendbuy account](https://retailer.friendbuy.io/) and going to Developer Center > Friendbuy Code.
merchantId.label: Friendbuy Merchant ID

actions.name: Track Custom Event
actions.description: Record when a customer completes any custom event that you define.

fields.label: Event Type
fields.description: The type of the event to track.

eventType.title: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of the event to track.

fields.label: Event Properties
fields.description: Object containing the properties for the event being tracked. All of the fields in this object will be sent in the root of the Friendbuy track event.

eventProperties.title: Event Properties
eventProperties.description: Object containing the properties for the event being tracked. All of the fields in this object will be sent in the root of the Friendbuy track event.

fields.label: Event ID
fields.description: An identifier for the event being tracked to prevent the same event from being rewarded more than once.

deduplicationId.title: Event ID
deduplicationId.description: An identifier for the event being tracked to prevent the same event from being rewarded more than once.

actions.name: Track Customer
actions.description: Create a new customer profile or update an existing customer profile.

fields.label: Name
fields.description: The user's full name. If the name trait doesn't exist then it will be automatically derived from the firstName and lastName traits if they are defined.

name.title: Name
name.description: The user's full name. If the name trait doesn't exist then it will be automatically derived from the firstName and lastName traits if they are defined.

fields.label: Birthday
fields.description: The user's birthday in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", or "0000-MM-DD" to omit the year.

birthday.title: Birthday
birthday.description: The user's birthday in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", or "0000-MM-DD" to omit the year.

fields.label: Customer Since
fields.description: The date the user became a customer.

customerSince.title: Customer Since
customerSince.description: The date the user became a customer.

fields.label: Loyalty Status
fields.description: The status of the user in your loyalty program. Valid values are "in", "out", or "blocked".

loyaltyStatus.title: Loyalty Status
loyaltyStatus.description: The status of the user in your loyalty program. Valid values are "in", "out", or "blocked".

fields.label: New Customer Flag
fields.description: Flag to indicate whether the user is a new customer.

isNewCustomer.title: New Customer Flag
isNewCustomer.description: Flag to indicate whether the user is a new customer.

fields.label: Custom Attributes
fields.description: Custom attributes to send to Friendbuy. You should pass an object whose keys are the names of the custom attributes and whose values are strings. Non-string-valued attributes will be dropped.

friendbuyAttributes.title: Custom Attributes
friendbuyAttributes.description: Custom attributes to send to Friendbuy. You should pass an object whose keys are the names of the custom attributes and whose values are strings. Non-string-valued attributes will be dropped.

actions.name: Track Page
actions.description: Record when a customer visits a new page. Allow Friendbuy widget targeting by Page Name instead of URL.

actions.name: Track Purchase
actions.description: Record when a customer makes a purchase.

fields.label: Purchase Amount
fields.description: Purchase amount to be considered when evaluating reward rules.

amount.title: Purchase Amount
amount.description: Purchase amount to be considered when evaluating reward rules.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: The currency of the purchase amount.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: The currency of the purchase amount.

fields.label: Coupon
fields.description: The coupon code of any coupon redeemed with the order.

coupon.title: Coupon
coupon.description: The coupon code of any coupon redeemed with the order.

fields.label: Friendbuy Attribution ID
fields.description: Friendbuy attribution ID that associates the purchase with the advocate who referred the purchaser.

attributionId.title: Friendbuy Attribution ID
attributionId.description: Friendbuy attribution ID that associates the purchase with the advocate who referred the purchaser.

fields.label: Friendbuy Referral ID
fields.description: Friendbuy referral code that associates the purchase with the advocate who referred the purchaser.

referralCode.title: Friendbuy Referral ID
referralCode.description: Friendbuy referral code that associates the purchase with the advocate who referred the purchaser.

fields.label: Gift Card Codes
fields.description: An array of gift card codes applied to the order.
